inputs.label: Total Daily Energy Expenditure
inputs.businessContext: Total calories burned per day from all activities and bodily functions

inputs.label: Basal Metabolic Rate
inputs.businessContext: Calories burned at rest to maintain vital functions

inputs.businessContext: Energy expended during digestion, absorption, and metabolism of food

inputs.label: Exercise Activity Thermogenesis
inputs.businessContext: Calories burned through planned physical exercise
